rewriteRule: Tone ve access prop'lari canonical siraya alinip readonly fallback aciklasmasi eklenir; label metni korunur.

stopConditions: tone value theme token map disinda ise rewrite atlanir
children icinde nested markup varsa tonal rewrite manuel review ister

rollbackPlan: semantic tone map review FAIL ise diff geri alinir
uppercase/layout bozulursa rollback story snapshot ile birlikte yapilir
notes: Tag rewrite'i label text veya casing davranisini degistirmez; yalniz prop normalization hedeflenir.
